tool.name: cookie_analyzer
tool.description: Analyze cookie security attributes for web applications.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Full security analysis of all cookies from a URL - Check specific security attributes (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite) - List all cookies from a URL - Identify session and authentication cookies - Detect missing security flags and misconfigurations

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The analysis action to perform: - analyze: Full security analysis of all cookies - check_attributes: Check specific security attributes - list: List all cookies from a URL

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL to analyze for cookies

parameter.name: cookie_name
parameter.description: Specific cookie name to analyze (optional, for filtering results)

returns.description: Cookie security analysis including issues, recommendations, and security score

tool.examples:
# Full security analysis
analyze https://example.com
# Check attributes for a specific cookie
check_attributes https://example.com session
# List all cookies
list https://example.com
